properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When the stars burn down And the earth wears out And we stand before the throne, With the witnesses who have gone before, We will rise and all applaud.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: Singing, "Blessing and honor and glory and power forever to our God." :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the hands of time wind fully down And the earth is rolled up like a scroll, The trumpets will call and the world will fall to its knees as we go home.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: Singing, "Blessing and honor and glory and power forever to our God." :/ x4

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: Star of the morning, light of salvation, majesty God of all mysteries, lord of the universe, righteous king :/

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There will come a day, standing face to face, in a moment we'll be like Him. He will wipe our eyes dry and take us up to His side And forever we will be His.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: /: Singing, "Blessing and honor and glory and power forever to our God." :/ x6
